zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed於1025年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam36歲，母親Sioned Verch Rhiwallon-23歲。他與Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1073年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed于1025年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam36岁，母亲Sioned Verch Rhiwallon-23岁。他与Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1073年在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: Sais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed was born in 1025, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam, was 36 and his mother, Sioned Verch Rhiwallon, was -23. He married Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1073, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed est né en 1025, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Sioned Verch Rhiwallon, avait -23 ans. Il a épousé Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1073, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wale: Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed 1025 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam 36 und seine Mutter Sioned Verch Rhiwallon -23. Er hat Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1073 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1073, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfedが1025年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gamは36歳，母Sioned Verch Rhiwallonは-23歳であった。Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1073年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed(이)가 1025년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Sioned Verch Rhiwallon(은)는 -23세였다. 그는 Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1073년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed nasceu em 1025, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Sioned Verch Rhiwallon, tinha -23 anos. Ele casou-se com Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1073, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed родился в 1025 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sioned Verch Rhiwallon, -23. Он женился на женщине по имени Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1073 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1073, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
